summary: Excellent audience recording with booming bass and a fun, sloppy 1985 Greek show highlighted by a spot‑on Fire performance
review: The tape captures the mid‑80s Greek concert with crystal‑clear highs, present mids and a thunderous low end thanks to Rango’s AKG mic setup, delivering an almost flawless listening experience. Musically the show is quintessential 1985 – fast‑paced, a little sloppy but full of energy, with Jerry’s rendition of Fire standing out while The Other One draws some criticism for weak vocal support.

ai_rating.rationale: Five detailed reviews give an average user rating of 4.2; recording quality is praised as pristine, and the performance, while noted as sloppy, is described as fun with standout moments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pristine audio fidelity with gleaming highs, clear mids and booming bass; AKG mics provide a clean, immersive soundstage despite being an audience capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Typical 1985 Greek set – lightning‑fast first set, a little sloppy but high‑energy throughout; the second half delivers fun jams despite occasional vocal weaknesses.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His Fire performance is praised as nailing all three verses exactly as recorded, showcasing tight guitar work and vocals.
